jobs.title: IT Systems Engineer (Cloud Infrastructure)
jobs.description: Join our global infrastructure team to design, build, and operate secure cloud platforms for our European businesses.
jobs.responsibilities: Design and implement cloud infrastructure on Azure and AWS, automate deployments using IaC tools, monitor system performance, and collaborate with security and application teams.
jobs.requirements: 3–5 years of experience in systems engineering or cloud operations, strong knowledge of Azure or AWS, scripting skills (PowerShell, Python), and fluency in English; German is a plus.

jobs.title: Application Support Analyst (SAP)
jobs.description: Provide Level 2/3 support for SAP modules used across our manufacturing subsidiaries in Germany.
jobs.responsibilities: Resolve SAP incidents, manage service requests, coordinate with external vendors, and support minor enhancements and testing.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years supporting SAP (FI/CO or MM/SD), experience with ITIL processes, strong communication skills, and willingness to be on-call in rotation.

jobs.title: Network Engineer
jobs.description: Manage campus and datacenter networks for our regional headquarters.
jobs.responsibilities: Configure and maintain routers, switches, and firewalls; monitor network performance; troubleshoot connectivity issues; and support network projects.
jobs.requirements: 3–5 years of network engineering experience, CCNA or equivalent, and solid understanding of routing and switching.

jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer
jobs.description: Lead data pipeline development to support analytics across the group’s US businesses.
jobs.responsibilities: Architect and build data pipelines, optimize data warehouses, and partner with analytics teams to deliver reliable datasets.
jobs.requirements: 7+ years in data engineering, experience with cloud data platforms, and strong SQL and Python skills.

jobs.title: Group Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Support group-level financial planning, analysis, and reporting.
jobs.responsibilities: Build financial models, consolidate subsidiary forecasts, and prepare monthly management reporting.
jobs.requirements: Degree in finance or accounting, strong Excel skills, and interest in corporate finance.

jobs.title: Operations Manager – Consumer Goods
jobs.description: Oversee production and logistics for our consumer goods subsidiary in Brazil.
jobs.responsibilities: Manage plant operations, drive process improvements, and coordinate with regional supply chain teams.
jobs.requirements: 8+ years in operations management, experience in FMCG manufacturing, and fluent Portuguese.

jobs.title: HR Business Partner – India
jobs.description: Partner with leaders across our Indian subsidiaries to drive people strategies.
jobs.responsibilities: Support workforce planning, talent development, and employee relations for multiple business units.
jobs.requirements: 5+ years in HR roles, experience as an HRBP preferred, and strong stakeholder management skills.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Specialist – B2B
jobs.description: Execute digital campaigns for our industrial and energy businesses in North America.
jobs.responsibilities: Manage paid search and social campaigns, optimize landing pages, and report on performance metrics.
jobs.requirements: 3–5 years of B2B digital marketing experience and familiarity with marketing automation platforms.

jobs.title: Sustainability Reporting Manager
jobs.description: Lead group sustainability reporting, including CSRD/ESG disclosures and ratings.
jobs.responsibilities: Coordinate data collection, prepare sustainability reports, and manage relationships with rating agencies.
jobs.requirements: 7+ years in sustainability or ESG reporting and experience with global reporting standards.

jobs.title: Software Engineer – Internal Tools
jobs.description: Develop and maintain internal web applications supporting finance and HR teams.
jobs.responsibilities: Implement new features, fix bugs, write tests, and participate in code reviews.
jobs.requirements: 0–2 years of software development experience, knowledge of modern web frameworks, and good communication skills.

sustainability_pages.title: Our 2030 Carbon Reduction Targets
sustainability_pages.summary: Details of our group-wide 2030 carbon reduction commitments, including Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets.
sustainability_pages.content: By 2030, we aim to reduce absolute Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions by 50% from a 2019 baseline. This page outlines our decarbonization levers, interim milestones, and governance structure, with specific targets for energy efficiency, renewable electricity, and fuel switching across our operations.

sustainability_pages.title: Climate & Energy Strategy
sustainability_pages.summary: Our overarching strategy for managing climate-related risks and opportunities across the group.
sustainability_pages.content: Our climate and energy strategy focuses on decarbonizing operations, enabling low-carbon solutions for customers, and building climate resilience. We describe our governance model, TCFD-aligned disclosure approach, and the role of internal carbon pricing in capital allocation decisions.

sustainability_pages.title: Circular Economy Roadmap 2030
sustainability_pages.summary: Our roadmap to embed circularity into product design, operations, and value chains by 2030.
sustainability_pages.content: We outline targets for recycled content, product life extension, waste reduction, and closed-loop partnerships, focusing on high-impact sectors such as consumer goods and industrial manufacturing.

sustainability_pages.title: Human Rights & Social Impact
sustainability_pages.summary: Our approach to human rights, community investment, and inclusive growth.
sustainability_pages.content: This page summarizes our human rights policy, due diligence processes in supply chains, and key social impact programs in education, skills, and community resilience.
